---
title: "nitrix.stats.gaussian"
generated: true
signature-hash: 5d07409157d10136
description: "Closed-form diagonal-Gaussian quantities."
listing:
  id: nitrix-stats-gaussian-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-stats-gaussian/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.stats.gaussian`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
Closed-form diagonal-Gaussian quantities.

- `kl_diagonal_gaussian` -- KL divergence of a diagonal Gaussian
  `N(mean, diag exp(log_var))` from the standard normal `N(0, I)`,
  in closed form.
- `gaussian_nll` -- negative log-likelihood of observations under a
  diagonal Gaussian.

Both are parameterised by `log_var` (the log of the variance) rather
than the variance or standard deviation: this keeps the variance
positive without a clamp and turns the `1 / var` and `log var` terms
into a numerically benign `exp(-log_var)` / `log_var`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-stats-gaussian-symbols}
:::
